title: APA CoA postdoctoral specialty practice areas
authority: American Psychological Association Commission on Accreditation
scope: The 11 specialty practice areas that Implementing Regulation C-5 P lists as currently meeting APA CoA provisions for postdoctoral residency accreditation. This is a bounded United States health-service psychology accreditation inventory, not a taxonomy of all psychology.
notes: Snapshot the source list as retrieved; create a new versioned reference-system record if the official list changes.
